title: Ica, IC — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Ica is a city in IC with a population of 250,000. A coastal desert city known for its pisco production, sand dunes, and the nearby Nazca Lines.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
